2604.26703.title: A self-evolving agent for explainable diagnosis of DFT-experiment band-gap mismatch
2604.26703.paper_summary: Standard density functional theory (DFT) routinely misclassifies the electronic ground state of correlated and structurally complex compounds, predicting metallic behaviour for materials that experiments report as semiconductors. Each such mismatch encodes a specific non-ideality -- magnetic ordering, electron correlation, an alternative polymorph, or a defect -- that the calculation excluded, but extracting that signal at scale has remained a manual exercise. Here we introduce XDFT, a closed-loop agent that diagnoses the mismatch automatically: it draws candidate hypotheses from a curated catalogue, executes the corresponding first-principles tests, and updates a global Bayesian posterior over hypothesis usefulness from each verdict. On a verified benchmark of 124 materials, XDFT identifies a resolving mechanism for 70 of 90 mismatch cases (78\%), an order of magnitude above a uniform-random baseline (19\%) and a static LLM ordering (20\%). The internal posterior aligns with empirical performance over the benchmark timeline, and resolved cases collapse into a tri-partite element-class taxonomy that we distil into a four-line static rule. Each diagnosed material is returned with a corrected protocol and a mechanistic attribution; failed cases are flagged as evidence-backed targets for experimental re-examination.
2604.26703.paper_summary_zh: 標準密度泛函理論 (DFT) 通常錯誤地將相關和結構複雜的化合物的電子基態分類，預測金屬行為的材料卻被實驗報告為半導體。每一個這樣的錯配都編碼了一個特定的非理想性——磁序、電子相關、替代多型或缺陷——這些計算未能考慮，但在大規模提取該信號仍然是一項手動工作。在此，我們介紹 XDFT，一個自動診斷錯配的閉環代理：它從經過策劃的目錄中提取候選假設，執行相應的第一性原理測試，並根據每個判決更新假設有效性的全球貝葉斯後驗。在一個經過驗證的 124 種材料基準上，XDFT 為 90 個錯配案例中的 70 個（78%）識別出了解決機制，這比均勻隨機基線（19%）和靜態 LLM 排序（20%）高出一個數量級。內部後驗與基準時間線上的實證表現一致，解決的案例歸納為一個三部分元素類別分類法，我們將其提煉為一條四行靜態規則。每個診斷的材料都會返回一個修正的協議和機制歸因；失敗的案例則被標記為有證據支持的實驗重新檢查目標。
2604.26703.author: Yue Li et.al.
